title: Optimize DynamoDB query pattern in auto-issues service
summary: auto-issues.ts currently uses a Query on the partition key only. Redesign keys and/or add an appropriate GSI/LSI so batch avatar lookups can use a Query with a begins_with condition on a sort key instead of relying on full-table scans.
acceptance: Implement an efficient Query-based access pattern for batch avatar lookups (e.g., using begins_with on a sort key or via a GSI/LSI) without introducing Scan-based full-table reads
Performance benchmarks show improved query time and/or reduced RCU consumption compared to the current pattern
No regression in query accuracy or result completeness for the defined access patterns
Documentation updated to describe the access pattern, key/GSI design, and rationale for using Query over Scan
impact: Medium - query performance improvement for auto-issues
notes: Trade-off: Prefer Query operations backed by well-designed partition/sort keys and/or GSIs/LSIs (for example, using begins_with on a sort key) over Scan, which performs full-table or full-partition reads and is typically more expensive. Only consider Scan as a last resort when the access pattern cannot be supported by key design.
